title: Profiling, Allocator Performance, and Hardening · Memory Trace: Cache Locality Layout
summary: A low-latency gateway reduces allocations but increases peak memory, fragmentation, and tail pauses under changed traffic. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem cache locality layout increment in measured allocator optimization report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate object layout, traversal order, working set, cache behavior, false sharing, and measured latency.
Measure allocation rate, size distribution, lifetime, peak live bytes, failures, and call sites with bounded telemetry.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
